_about: Bewiched EOS Weekly Scorecard — v1 DRAFT data. Live-weekly series pulled from BigQuery (project bewiched-coffee-368116, dataset bewiched_coffee, europe-west2) on the generation date. Monthly/manual rows seeded from the latest dashboard snapshot (allstores.json) and flagged. See _assumptions.

measurables.name: Total weekly sales (£, gross inc VAT)
measurables.note: Goal is the VTO 1-year target (£190k pw). Live weekly from POS.

measurables.name: Sales vs last year (LFL %)
measurables.source: BigQuery v_sales_details_flat, this wk vs same wk 2025
measurables.note: Goal is the VTO Lfl +10% target. Compares each week to the matching week 364 days earlier.

measurables.name: Transactions (guest checks)
measurables.note: Goal set from the trailing run-rate (~25k/wk) — CONFIRM the right weekly target.

measurables.name: Average transaction value (£)
measurables.note: Goal set from the trailing run-rate (~£7.40) — CONFIRM.

measurables.name: Wastage % of net sales
measurables.note: Goal ≤3% (your stated target). NB this is wastage COST as % of TOTAL net sales — runs lower than the food-only yield figure on the store dashboards. Confirm which definition you want to govern by.

measurables.name: Wages / labour % of sales
measurables.source: Directors P&L pack (monthly) — BigQuery schedule view currently incomplete
measurables.note: NOT yet live-weekly: the BigQuery schedule/salary view is currently near-empty so wage cost can't be pulled weekly. Source from the monthly P&L for now. Goal 30% is a PLACEHOLDER — confirm your labour target.

measurables.name: Gross profit % (GP%)
measurables.source: Cost of Sales sheet / Directors P&L (monthly)
measurables.note: NOT live-weekly: the Cost of Sales sheet is a 50k-row raw stock-moves input, not a weekly GP% summary. Source GP% from the monthly P&L. Goal 72% is a PLACEHOLDER — confirm.

measurables.name: CPH — £ sales per labour hour (estate avg)
measurables.source: Store Targets sheet (per-site CPH), estate average
measurables.note: Seeded from the per-site CPH targets snapshot (estate avg £53). Goal £60 is a PLACEHOLDER. Could become weekly once labour hours are reliably in BigQuery.

measurables.name: Google rating (estate average ★)
measurables.note: Estate average live rating (snapshot 4.74). Can be refreshed weekly from Google Business Profile. New-reviews-this-week could be added as a second line.

measurables.name: Brand audit / F1 score (estate avg, /5)
measurables.note: Estate average QTD audit score (snapshot 4.66/5). The F1 sheet is weekly so this CAN be a live-weekly cell once wired.

measurables.name: RMS 'Rate My Shift' (team, /5)
measurables.note: Estate average team shift rating (snapshot 4.37). Proxy for the VTO recognition/engagement goal. Goal 4.5 is a PLACEHOLDER.

measurables.name: Return-to-work compliance %
measurables.note: ⚠ VERIFY: snapshot estate average is 44.6%, which almost certainly reflects data completeness / few RTW cases rather than true compliance. Do not act on this number until the HRP source is validated.

_assumptions: See the Assumptions panel rendered on the page.
